definition_en: An official document that allows you to travel to other countries.
sentence_1: Don't forget to pack your passport.
sentence_2: He showed his passport at the border.

definition_en: A building where you pay to stay in a room.
sentence_1: We booked a hotel near the beach.
sentence_2: The hotel has a swimming pool.

sentence_1: Our flight leaves at eight tomorrow morning.
sentence_2: The flight was delayed by two hours.

definition_en: A drawing of an area that shows where roads and places are.
sentence_1: Let's check the map to find our way.
sentence_2: He drew a map of the city.

definition_en: A small piece of paper that shows you have paid for a journey.
sentence_1: You must buy a ticket before boarding.
